title: Practice Admin Read-Only Overview
goal: Replace the placeholder /practice/admin page with a minimal read-only overview that lets admins inspect existing practice menus and per-menu structure coverage using only current read queries, without introducing authoring writes or widening runtime/store boundaries.
constraints: Keep router, ProtectedRoute, authStore, practiceStore, runtime, queries, types, menuView, and sessionView unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Use existing read helpers first: fetchPracticeMenus and fetchPracticeMenuBundle; do not add DB writes, session lifecycle actions, or authoring mutations
Keep the admin overview read-only and separate from browse/session helper responsibilities by using a dedicated pure adminView helper if derived summary logic is needed
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, admin/game cross-import, display:none, or inline hardcoded style values
Reuse existing gameVariables.css tokens first and keep CSS additive inside PracticePlaceholder.module.css
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: /practice/admin loads under the existing protected admin route and no longer renders only a placeholder message
The page shows loading, empty, and error states for the selected store's practice menus using existing read paths only

Selecting or opening a menu shows a deterministic read-only structure summary derived from PracticeMenuBundle, including menu-level counts and per-step-group coverage data without React/Zustand/Supabase imports in the pure helper
The overview clearly separates text tacit, pure media tacit, and linked media counts without changing menuView/sessionView contracts
No session creation, persistence writes, or practice authoring forms are introduced, and practiceStore/runtime/query/type boundaries remain behaviorally unchanged

Vitest coverage exists for adminView summary derivation, and npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, npm run lint, and the targeted vitest command pass with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 lint warning and the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk warning
